artifacts.title: Google receipt from 2022-06-07
artifacts.excerpt:
Hey @GergelyOrosz,

Just had a new joiner today at Google trying to argue that we should do Agile. Pointing him directly at your article made it clearer and faster why we don't typically do it. 

https://t.co/H8UB8BYxch

Thanks a lot for writing it!
